title: Virtuoso 7.1.0 does not return correct datatype for language-specified strings
description:
Using
http://affymetrix.bio2rdf.org/sparql
SELECT ?datatype
WHERE {
 ?s a http://bio2rdf.org/affymetrix_vocabulary:Probeset .
 ?s http://purl.org/dc/terms/title ?o .
  FILTER isLiteral(?o)
  BIND(DATATYPE(?o) AS ?datatype) .
}
limit 1

returns an empty value, but is expected to return rdf:langString as per http://www.w3.org/TR/sparql11-query/#func-datatype
LANG(?o) does return the language string.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, lang_title VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, title, lang_title) VALUES (1, 'Sample Title', 'Sample Title'::VARCHAR);
SELECT id, title, lang_title, SUBSTRING(lang_title FROM '\[\w+\]') AS lang FROM test_strings WHERE lang_title IS NOT NULL;
SELECT pg_typeof(lang_title) AS datatype FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT 'datatype' FROM test_strings WHERE lang_title IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1;
key_bug_features: Incorrect datatype returned for language-specified strings
